title: At the Café
description: Learn how to order drinks and snacks at a Dutch café.

content.text: Welcome! In this lesson, you'll learn how to order at a Dutch café ('het café'). The Dutch love their coffee and 'gezelligheid' (coziness)!

content.title: Ordering a Drink
content.setting: You sit down at a cozy café. The waiter comes to take your order.

conversation_flow.title: Receive your drink
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Komt eraan. Eén koffie met melk.

content.title: Ordering Food
content.setting: The waiter returns and asks if you want something to eat.

conversation_flow.title: Ask for a recommendation
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Wilt u er ook iets bij eten?

conversation_flow.title: Order apple pie
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Onze appeltaart is heel lekker. Of misschien een broodje kaas?

content.title: Paying and Leaving
content.setting: You've finished your coffee and apple pie. Time to pay.

conversation_flow.title: Ask for the bill
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Fijn om te horen! Anders nog iets?

conversation_flow.title: Say goodbye
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Dat is dan 8 euro 50. Dank u wel en tot ziens!

content.text: Lekker gedaan! You can now confidently order at a Dutch café. In the next lesson, we'll learn how to ask for directions!
